and keep the distance

we have to dance

Budimo kod mene sami

Opet svuda po Evropi nastupe na bini

PuniƒНemo opet Cirih, Dizeldorf i BeƒН.

Tu je ƒРole ƒРogani
Idemo na Mars, pun je gas,

Ritam te radi, radi
super je ≈°to smo sami,

en.title: Mladen has 32 registered old timers, 4K video
en.description: Mladen CvitanoviƒЗ from Golubinja near ≈љepƒНe is known for being the first Bosnian to buy a train and carriages to make a tourist attraction. The locomotive and wagons are in good condition. However, he is the real King of old timers because he has 32 registered old timers in his collection. He also had Elvis Presley's Cadillac in his collection but changed it for a 1936 Renault Primaquatre. This is how Mladen claims to be the only car in the world that is registered and is in his collection. In addition to the old timer, Mladen also buys houses, land, forests ... So he bought the whole village in his place. People went out into the world and Mladen bought their houses and properties. Today he plants fruits, raises sheep and chickens. It is interesting to note that Mladen has passed the pilot exam. He drove airplanes and helicopters, but never drove a tractor. Take a look at a story that can inspire and encourage you to start a business.

 вАЬBiraz umut ekmi≈Яtim ≈Яuraya, s√ґk√Љp atmƒ±≈Яlar usulcaвА¶вАЭ

SuzanвАЩƒ±n d√Љ≈Яmesiyle ya≈Яanan beklenmedik sonu√І HarikaвАЩnƒ±n annesinin ge√Іmi≈Яiyle ilgili yeni bir ≈Яey daha √ґƒЯrenmesine sebep olur. snippet.title: Space Jam: A New Legacy вАУ Trailer 1
snippet.description:
Tunes vs. Goons. Watch LeBron James and Bugs Bunny in the new trailer for Space Jam: A New Legacy. In theaters and streaming on HBO Max вАУ July 16. #SpaceJamMovie 

-----------------
https://www.facebook.com/SpaceJamMovieвАЛ
https://www.instagram.com/SpaceJamMovie/вАЛ
https://twitter.com/spacejammovie/вАЛ
-----------------
Welcome to the Jam!  Basketball champion and global icon LeBron James goes on an epic adventure alongside timeless Tune Bugs Bunny with the animated/live-action event вАЬSpace Jam: A New Legacy,вАЭ from director Malcolm D. Lee and an innovative filmmaking team including Ryan Coogler and Maverick Carter.  This transformational journey is a manic mashup of two worlds that reveals just how far some parents will go to connect with their kids. When LeBron and his young son Dom are trapped in a digital space by a rogue A.I., LeBron must get them home safe by leading Bugs, Lola Bunny and the whole gang of notoriously undisciplined Looney Tunes to victory over the A.I.вАЩs digitized champions on the court: a powered-up roster of professional basketball stars as youвАЩve never seen them before.  ItвАЩs Tunes versus Goons in the highest-stakes challenge of his life, that will redefine LeBronвАЩs bond with his son and shine a light on the power of being yourself. The ready-for-action Tunes destroy convention, supercharge their unique talents and surprise even вАЬKingвАЭ James by playing the game their own way.

James stars alongside Oscar nominee Don Cheadle (the вАЬAvengersвАЭ films, вАЬHotel RwandaвАЭ), Khris Davis (вАЬJudas and the Black Messiah,вАЭ TVвАЩs вАЬAtlantaвАЭ), Sonequa Martin-Green (TVвАЩs вАЬThe Walking Dead,вАЭ вАЬStar Trek: DiscoveryвАЭ), newcomer Cedric Joe, Jeff Bergman (вАЬLooney Tunes CartoonsвАЭ), Eric Bauza (вАЬLooney Tunes CartoonsвАЭ), and Zendaya (upcoming вАЬDune,вАЭ вАЬMalcolm & MarieвАЭ).

Lee (вАЬGirls Trip,вАЭ вАЬNight SchoolвАЭ) directs from a screenplay by Juel Taylor & Tony Rettenmaier & Keenan Coogler & Terence Nance.  The filmвАЩs producers are Ryan Coogler, LeBron James, Maverick Carter and Duncan Henderson, and the executive producers are Sev Ohanian, Zinzi Coogler, Allison Abbate, Jesse Ehrman, Jamal Henderson, Spencer Beighley, Justin Lin, Terence Nance and Ivan Reitman.

The directorвАЩs behind-the-scenes creative team includes director of photography Salvatore Totino (вАЬSpider-Man: HomecomingвАЭ), animation producer Troy Nethercott (вАЬWonder ParkвАЭ), production designers Kevin Ishioka (вАЬThe MuleвАЭ), Akin McKenzie (NetflixвАЩs вАЬWhen They See UsвАЭ) and Clint Wallace (upcoming вАЬEternalsвАЭ), editor Bob Ducsay (вАЬGodzilla: King of the Monsters,вАЭ вАЬStar Wars Episode VIII вАУ The Last JediвАЭ) and costume designer Melissa Bruning (вАЬRampage,вАЭ вАЬWar for the Planet of the ApesвАЭ).  The music is by Kris Bowers (вАЬGreenbook,вАЭ NetflixвАЩs вАЬBridgertonвАЭ).

Warner Bros. Pictures Presents a Proximity/The SpringHill Company Production, a Malcolm D. Lee Film, вАЬSpace Jam: A New Legacy.вАЭ  The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures.  It will be released in theaters nationwide on July 16, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.

snippet.title: Emanet 147. B√ґl√Љm Fragmanƒ± | Legacy Episode 147 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвАЩs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвА¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвАЩs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: BMW M4 v AMG C63 v Audi RS5 - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwowвАЛ and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

HowвАЩs this for an all-new epic drag race! 

WeвАЩve got Mat in the all-new BMW M4, and heвАЩs lining up alongside the Mercedes-AMG C63 S & Audi RS5!

So how do they match up? First up we've got the M4, and under the bonnet youвАЩll find a 3-litre straight-six which can deliver 510hp & 660Nm of torque. 

As for the AMG, well itвАЩs not too different. It may have a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 instead, but it can also deliver 510hp, coupled with 700Nm. Finally we have the RS5, which has a 2.9-litre V6 which can put down 450hp and 600Nm of torque. 

Think the Audi is the underdog? Well it has one key benefit - Quattro AWD! As for both the BMW and AMG? Well, they've only got RWD! Will that make the difference? YouвАЩll have to keep watching to find out!

Check out our German YouTube channel - https://www.youtube.com/carwow-Deutschland

snippet.description:
вАЮNovi Sputnjik poredakвАЬ otkriva kako razmi≈°lja ≈°ef ruske diplomatije Sergej Lavrov.

Za≈°to s Amerikom vi≈°e nema ozbiljnog razgovora, a njena politika ipak nema ≈°ansi da uspe? snippet.title: IMPRESIVNO sa RR - BAKA PRASE : TERETE ME JER SAM MNOGO JAKA GLAVA!
snippet.description:
Od 16. marta, svakog utorka na mom yt kanalu u 19h gledacete novu epizodu IMPRESIVNO sa Ruzom Rupic. Ugosticu mnoge javne licnosti iz raznih sfera javnog zivota koje cete upoznati u potpuno drugacijem svetlu. Pricacemo o njihovim karijerama, pocecima, sta im je bilo najteze, a sta najlakse u njihovom putu i pevacemo! Pomoc cu imati od mog producenta Pavla Radulovica. Danas mi je u gostima Bogdan Ilic, poznatiji kao, Baka Prase! Kako je poceo da snima, kakve probleme donosi popularnost, o dramama i hapsenju, pricace sa mnom u danasnjoj epizodi!
Nadam se da ce vam se dopasti celokupan projekat, a mi se vidimo svakog utorka od 19h.

WIIP: https://wiip.rs

Pavlezi: https://www.instagram.com/pavlezi.mp3/

GLE.TV Production

snippet.title: Emanet 152. B√ґl√Љm Fragmanƒ± | Legacy Episode 152 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвАЩs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвА¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвАЩs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: Ne≈°to novo i prelepo! Farbanje jaja za Uskrs sa step sokovima za ƒНas! Easter eggs.
snippet.description:
Farbanje uskr≈°njih jaja na ovaj naƒНin je fantazija, lako, brzo, prelepo. Boje mogu biti pastelne, ne≈Њne a mogu i intezivnije. Kako ko voli. Ja volim da ima i jednih i drugih, mada ove ne≈Њnije su mi dra≈Њe.
#uskrsnjajaja #farbanjejaja #Easter
bojenje jaja
jaja za uskrs
novo
serpica recepti
serpica uskr≈°nja jaja

Na blogu: http://www.serpica.net/2021/03/farbanje-jaja-za-uskrs-sa-step-sokom.html

IZBELJIVANJE JAJA: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rffoDA9kHW4

DEKUPA≈љ - SA SALVETAMA: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RYcPeUa01YA

JAJA NA PARI: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=go92uwCASi4

SVETLUCAVA JAJA U VINU: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=i_m8kWH8gIg

FARBANJE JAJA U LUKOVINI: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7QSARBHTw-c
***********************************************************************
Kupite pra≈°kasti sok od jagode (ili rum punƒНa, maline), pomorandze i ako uspete pronaƒЗi jo≈° koju boju (step sok od limete) bilo bi odliƒНno.

Jedna kesica (10 gr.) je dovoljna za 10 komada jaja.

Jaja operite i mokrim sunƒСerom skinite peƒНat ako ima.

Stavite jaja u ≈°erpicu, nalijte vodu da prekrije, dodajte pola ka≈°iƒНice soli.

Kuvajte deset minuta. Sklonite sa ringle i odmah, u vrelo dodajte step sok koji ≈Њelite. Ni≈°ta ne me≈°ajte, sok ƒЗe se sam rastopiti.

Ostavite tako 15 minuta. Za ne≈Њniju boju, rozu jaja dr≈Њite kraƒЗe u soku.

Istresite teƒНnost i jaja stavite na radnu povr≈°inu da se osu≈°e, par minuta. Za mat izgled jaja ostavite takva kakva jesu ili ih prema≈Њite uljem da dobiju sjaj.

≈†to se tiƒНe ≈Њutih jaja koja se dobije od step soka od pomorand≈Њe, jaja je najbolje predhodno izbeliti u sirƒЗetu i vodi, postupak za izbeljivanje je ovde: https://youtu.be/rffoDA9kHW4  mada sam pokazala i u ovom videu sa step sokom.
Ako nemate step sok mo≈Њe bilo koji drugi.

I bez politike molim! Ima toliko tema o kojima mozemo pisati, u prvom planu su recepti iz nasih kuhinjica uz to se mozemo i druziti, caskati uz kaficu.

snippet.description:
Son Yaz 15. B√ґl√Љm 1. Fragmanƒ± | Ba≈Яka Kollarda Teselli

ƒ∞dealist Cumhuriyet Savcƒ±sƒ± Selim Kara (Ali Atay), 8 yƒ±l √ґnce hapse yolladƒ±ƒЯƒ± organize su√І lideri Sel√Іuk Ta≈Яkƒ±nвАЩdan (Arif Pi≈Яkin) reddedemeyeceƒЯi bir teklif alƒ±r. Sel√Іuk Ta≈Яkƒ±n, Savcƒ± Selim KaraвАЩnƒ±n b√Љt√Љn su√І √ґrg√Љt√Љn√Љ √І√ґkertecek davasƒ±nda, tanƒ±klƒ±k yapmayƒ± istemektedir. Ancak bunun i√Іin tek bir ≈Яartƒ± vardƒ±r; oƒЯlu Akg√Љn G√ґkalp Ta≈Яkƒ±nвАЩƒ± (Alperen Duymaz) Selim KaraвАЩnƒ±n bizzat korumasƒ±вА¶ Su√І d√Љnyasƒ± i√Іinde b√Љy√Љm√Љ≈Я, tehlikeli ve sorunlu g√ґr√Љn√Љm√Љn√Љn ardƒ±nda duygusal bir gen√І olan Akg√Љn i√Іin bu kabul edilmesi g√Љ√І bir durumdur. Hayat beklemediƒЯi bir yerden daha sƒ±nar SelimвАЩi; ƒ∞zmirвАЩde √Іocuklarƒ± ile ya≈Яayan e≈Яi Canan (Funda EryiƒЯit) bo≈Яanmak istemektedir. Ailesi ile i≈Яi arasƒ±nda kalan Savcƒ± Kara, ba≈Я belasƒ± olarak g√ґrd√ЉƒЯ√Љ Akg√ЉnвАЩ√Љ ailesinin yanƒ±na ƒ∞zmir √Зe≈ЯmeвАЩde bulunan Adalet SitesiвАЩne g√ґt√Љrmek zorunda kalƒ±r. SelimвАЩin beklenmeyen misafiri Akg√ЉnвАЩ√Љn geli≈Яi site sakinlerinin t√Љm dengelerini alt√Љst edecek; EgeвАЩde ba≈Яlayan bu r√Љzg√Ґr, herkesin hayatƒ±nƒ± deƒЯi≈Яtirecek b√Љy√Љk bir fƒ±rtƒ±naya d√ґn√Љ≈Яecektir.

OYUNCULAR: ALPEREN DUYMAZ, ALƒ∞ ATAY, FUNDA ERYƒ∞ƒЮƒ∞T, HAFSANUR SANCAKTUTAN, EMRE KARAYEL, Sƒ∞NAN TUZCU, ≈ЮEBNEM D√ЦNMEZ, ARƒ∞F Pƒ∞≈ЮKƒ∞N, SEZER KO√З, HALƒ∞L BAB√ЬR, YASEMƒ∞N YAZICI, ERDEM ≈ЮANLI, YUNUS NARƒ∞N, ATA NEDƒ∞M ARMAN, SARP ƒ∞Kƒ∞LER, CENGƒ∞Z OKUYUCU

ar.description: ўГЎІўЖ ўКЎІ ўЕўГЎІўЖ ўБўК Ў™ЎіўИўГўИЎ±ўИўБЎІЎМ ўКЎ™ўЖЎІўИўД ўЗЎ∞ЎІ ЎІўДўЕЎ≥ўДЎ≥ўД ўВЎµЎ© "ўКўДўЕЎІЎ≤" ЎІўДЎ∞ўК ўКЎђЎІЎ≤ўБ Ў®ЎІўДЎѓЎЃўИўД Ў•ўДўЙ ЎІўДЎ≥ЎђўЖ ўЕўЖ Ў£ЎђўД ЎІўДЎ≠Ў® ўИўВЎµЎ© "Ў≤ўДўКЎЃЎ©" ЎІўДЎ™ўК ўКЎ≠ўГўЕ ЎєўДўКўЗЎІ Ў®Ў≤ЎІўИЎђ Ў™ЎєўКЎ≥ ўЕЎє ЎіЎЃЎµ ўДЎІ Ў™Ў≠Ў®ўЗ ўЕўЖ Ў£ЎђўД Ў£ўЖ ўКЎ®ўВўЙ ЎІўДЎ±ЎђўД ЎІўДЎ∞ўК Ў™Ў≠Ў®ўЗ ЎєўДўЙ ўВўКЎѓ ЎІўДЎ≠ўКЎІЎ© ўЕўИЎґўИЎєЎІ ўДўЗ. Ў•ўЖ Ў≠Ў® ўКўДўЕЎІЎ≤ ўИ Ў≤ўДўКЎЃЎ© ЎІўДЎ∞ўК Ў®ЎѓЎ£ ўБўК ЎІЎ≥ЎЈўЖЎ®ўИўД ўКўГЎ™Ў® ЎєўДўКўЗ ЎІўДЎІЎ≥Ў™Ў≥ўДЎІўЕ ўДўДўВЎѓЎ±. Ў•ўЖ ЎІўДЎіЎІЎ®ўКўЖ ЎІўДЎ∞ўКўЖ ўКўЖўБЎµўД ЎЈЎ±ўКўВўЗўЕЎІ Ў®ўКўЖўЕЎІ ўКўВўИўЕўИўЖ Ў®Ў™Ў≠ЎґўКЎ±ЎІЎ™ ЎІўДЎ≤ўИЎІЎђЎМ Ў≥ўКўИЎІЎђўЗўИўЖ ЎІўДЎІўЕЎ™Ў≠ЎІўЖ ЎІўДЎ£ўГЎ®Ў± ўБўК Ў£ЎґўЖЎІ. ўКЎ™ўВЎІЎЈЎє ЎЈЎ±ўКўВ Ў≤ўДўКЎЃЎ© ўЕЎє ўЕЎє ЎѓўЕўКЎ± ўКўЕЎІўЖ ўИЎІўДЎ∞ўК ўЗўИ ЎІўДўИўДЎѓ ЎІўДўИЎ≠ўКЎѓ ўДЎ£Ў≠Ўѓ Ў£ўБЎ±ЎІЎѓ ЎІўДЎєўИЎІЎ¶ўД ЎІўДЎєЎ±ўКўВЎ© ўИЎІўДЎЂЎ±ўКЎ© ўБўК Ў™ЎіўИўГўИЎ±ўИўБЎІ. ўДўКЎ≥ ўЗўЖЎІўГ ЎіўКЎ° ўДўЖ ўКўБЎєўДўЗ ЎѓўЕўКЎ± ўИЎІўДЎ∞ўК ўКЎ≠Ў® Ў≤ўДўКЎЃЎ© Ў≠Ў®ЎІ Ў®ўДЎІ ўЗўИЎІЎѓЎ© ўЕўЖ Ў£ЎђўДўЗЎІ. Ў•ўЖ ўКўДўЕЎІЎ≤ ўИ Ў≤ўДўКЎЃЎ© Ў≠Ў™ўЙ ўИўДўИ Ў£Ў±ЎІЎѓўИЎІ Ў£ўЖ ўКЎєўКЎіўИЎІ Ў≠Ў®ўЗўЕ Ў®ЎІўДЎ±ЎЇўЕ ўЕўЖ ўГўД ЎіўКЎ° ўБўБўК Ў®ЎєЎґ ЎІўДЎ£Ў≠ўКЎІўЖ Ў≥Ў™ўГўИўЖ ЎєЎІЎ¶ўДЎ© ўКўЕЎІўЖ ўИўБўК Ў®ЎєЎґ ЎІўДЎ£Ў≠ўКЎІўЖ Ў≥ўКўГўИўЖ ЎІўДўВЎѓЎ± ЎєЎІЎ¶ўВЎІ ўДўЗўЕЎІ. Ў•ўЖ ЎІўДЎ≠Ў® ЎІўДЎ∞ўК ўГЎІўЖ ўВЎѓ ЎЇўКЎ± ЎђЎЇЎ±ЎІўБўКЎ© Ў™ЎіўИўГўИЎ±ўИўБЎІ ЎІўДЎіЎІЎ≥ЎєЎ© ўБўК ЎєЎІўЕ 1970 ЎМ Ў≥ўКЎ®ўВўЙ Ў±ўЗўКўЖЎ© ЎІўДЎ≠Ў≥ЎІЎ®ЎІЎ™ ЎЇўКЎ± ЎІўДўЕЎЇўДўВЎ© ўИ Ў≠Ў±ўИЎ® ЎІўДўВўИЎ©.

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! рЯСА


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter вЦЇ https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram вЦЇhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook вЦЇhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-¬≠filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

ParentвАЩs Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

snippet.title: MEDICO - Mamma Mia (prod. by EnelBeatz)
snippet.description:
INSTAGRAM PROFILI:
Medico : https://www.instagram.com/whoismedico/

Music: Medico
Text: Medico
Arrangement: EnelBeatz, Arpino Sachi
Back vocal: Ma≈°a Sitarica
Mix & Master: Arpino Sachi


Video production: Vedad Mandra | xvedmanx
Directed by: Medico, Vedad Mandra
Script: Vedad Mandra, Medico
Camera: Vedad Mandra
CC VFX Post: Vedad Mandra
Costume: Emina Tsili

TEXT

bridge:
o mama mia mama
ko zmija zlu tom prija
uvijek zijan karma
sve vrti se sve dharma 
mama mia

ref.
i ja toga svjestan sam necastan cin mi je
jastuk na nju mirise polijem viskijem x2


vers1
moje sve htjele bi bit
 jer na meni samo je lagerfeld karl e 
zelja joj htjela benz
 nije ni bitno ko sjedi sa strane

moli da voli brzo da boli
moli za gole sate
prolij pa dolij 
glumi mi dolly dobro ta zna sta radi

meni ti nisi stipsa
jasno vidno je da tvoj tip sam
svaki drugi il treci ti kiksa
sto bas ja da sam tvoj schicksal

takvih meni puna je lista
sklonim te ko potezom kista
u minuti raste mi ista
samo za noc dobra za vise nista

bridge:
o mama mia mama
ko zmija zlu tom prija
uvijek zijan karma
sve vrati se sve dharma 
mama mia

 ref.
i ja toga svjestan sam necastan cin mi je
jastuk na nju mirise polijem viskijem x3


vers 2.
da li mislis na mene ko prije
prisjetis se probije ko noz
navijas ti za mene i lijek
tvoj sam jedini ja antidot

znas ti moje namjere ne nisu namjerne
ali vuce me na zlo
velike su razmjere izmedju zavjere
razlika je nebo tlo

meni ti nisi stipsa
jasno vidno je da tvoj tip sam
svaki drugil treci ti kiksa
sto bas ja da sam tvoj schicksal
takvih meni puna je lista
sklonim te ko potezom kista
u minuti raste mi ista
samo za noc dobra za vise nista

Zadnji dio puzle, tacnije price o 300ks je slozen! Za sada vise nista ne moram raditi, cak ni dizne mjenjati jer su i WRX dovoljno jake za ovaj setup.
